  • Impact

Sustainability Through the Ages

Explore Intel’s innovation journey from early microprocessors to modern sustainability leadership.

Explore Timeline

Innovation Timeline

Scroll horizontally (Scroll Snap enabled) to explore milestones.

1968

Intel Founded

Intel begins its journey in semiconductor innovation.

1971

First Microprocessor

The Intel 4004 introduces computing on a single chip.

1978

8086 Processor

Defines the x86 architecture still used today.

1985

386 Processor

Introduces 32-bit computing and multitasking.

Innovation With Impact

Intel continues investing in renewable energy and sustainable manufacturing.

The Future Starts Here

Building a more sustainable future through technology.
